calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of His Motion To Compel Discovery Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Form Interrogatories; And Requests For Admission
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Birndorf of Birndorf Law Offices telephone number (310) 914-8400 for Appellant.
Robert Depew of Employment Law Resource Group telephone number (415) 529-4770 for Respondents.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, RESPONDENT ALAN HAHN'S Motion In Support of His Motion To Compel Discovery Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Form Interrogatories; And Requests For Admission is granted in part/denied in part (see order for full test). Order signed in open Court.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
